name: Reality Pack

enableRealityAutoCollect.label: Reality auto collect
enableRealityAutoCollect.description: Automatically collect ready Reality / soul power in the void world.

enableScanRealitySurges.label: Scan reality surges
enableScanRealitySurges.description: Create random reality-plane surges when a supercritical kernel lands.

enableScanRealitySlider.label: Supercritical kernel slider
enableScanRealitySlider.description: Show the supercritical kernel range and Reality infusion slider on its shop card.

enableScanRealitySurgesSliderStrength.label: Scale surge strength by Reality infusion
enableScanRealitySurgesSliderStrength.description: Use the supercritical kernel slider Reality infusion to scale surge count and spawn radius.

surgeCount.label: Surge count
surgeCount.description: Number of random surges to create when a supercritical kernel lands.

surgeRadius.label: Spawn radius
surgeRadius.description: Circular radius, in cells, used to search for empty reality-plane spawn spots.

enableSuperSilo.label: Super Silo
enableSuperSilo.description: Keep activated silos filled with the configured long fill amount.

fillAmount.label: Long fill amount
fillAmount.description: Fill value assigned to activated silos.

enableHollowVentReality.label: Hollow vent Reality source
enableHollowVentReality.description: Let hollow vents grow Reality symbols that are automatically harvested through the void altar.

ventRealityInterval.label: Vent production time
ventRealityInterval.description: Seconds each hollow vent takes to grow a Reality symbol.

ventRealityAmount.label: Small vent Reality
ventRealityAmount.description: Reality gained from each small hollow vent symbol.

ventRealityLargeMultiplier.label: Large vent multiplier
ventRealityLargeMultiplier.description: Multiplier applied to the large hollow vent Reality output.

hollowTimeFlowMode.label: Hollow Stone time flow
hollowTimeFlowMode.description: Continuously choose the Hollow Stone time distortion mode: slowdown, normal, acceleration, or random vanilla multiplier.

sectionLabel.ptbr: Fluxo de tempo da Pedra Oca
sectionLabel.es: Flujo temporal de la Piedra hueca
sectionLabel.fr: Flux temporel de la pierre creuse
sectionLabel.jp: ホロウストーンの時間の流れ
sectionLabel.thai: การไหลของเวลาหินกลวง

enableFlatBuildCosts.label: Disable build cost scaling
enableFlatBuildCosts.description: Keep every building at its base construction cost instead of scaling by existing building count.

description: Combines Auto Reality Collect, Scan Reality Surges, and Super Silo into one TweaksX mod.

en.name: Reality Pack
en.description: Combines Auto Reality Collect, Scan Reality Surges, and Super Silo into one TweaksX mod.

surgeCount.label: Surge count
surgeCount.description: Number of random surges to create when a supercritical kernel lands.

surgeRadius.label: Spawn radius
surgeRadius.description: Circular radius, in cells, used to search for empty reality-plane spawn spots.

fillAmount.label: Long fill amount
fillAmount.description: Fill value assigned to activated silos.

enableRealityAutoCollect.label: Reality auto collect
enableRealityAutoCollect.description: Automatically collect ready Reality / soul power in the void world.

enableScanRealitySurges.label: Scan reality surges
enableScanRealitySurges.description: Create random reality-plane surges when a supercritical kernel lands.

enableSuperSilo.label: Super Silo
enableSuperSilo.description: Keep activated silos filled with the configured long fill amount.

enableScanRealitySlider.label: Supercritical kernel slider
enableScanRealitySlider.description: Show the supercritical kernel range and Reality infusion slider on its shop card.

enableScanRealitySurgesSliderStrength.label: Strength follows Reality infusion
enableScanRealitySurgesSliderStrength.description: When enabled, surge count and spawn radius scale with the supercritical kernel Reality infusion; when disabled, the configured count and radius are used.

enableHollowVentReality.label: Hollow vent Reality source
enableHollowVentReality.description: Let hollow vents grow Reality symbols that are automatically harvested through the void altar.

ventRealityInterval.label: Vent production time
ventRealityInterval.description: Seconds each hollow vent takes to grow a Reality symbol.

ventRealityAmount.label: Small vent Reality
ventRealityAmount.description: Reality gained from each small hollow vent symbol.

ventRealityLargeMultiplier.label: Large vent multiplier
ventRealityLargeMultiplier.description: Multiplier applied to the large hollow vent Reality output.

enableFlatBuildCosts.label: Disable build cost scaling
enableFlatBuildCosts.description: Keep every building at its base construction cost instead of scaling by existing building count.

hollowTimeFlowMode.label: Hollow Stone time flow
hollowTimeFlowMode.description: Continuously choose the Hollow Stone time distortion mode: slowdown, normal, acceleration, or random vanilla multiplier.

ru.name: Пакет Reality
ru.description: Объединяет автосбор Reality, волны от сканирования и супер-силос в один мод TweaksX.

surgeCount.label: Количество волн
surgeCount.description: Number of random surges to create when a supercritical kernel lands.

surgeRadius.label: Радиус появления
surgeRadius.description: Circular radius, in cells, used to search for empty reality-plane spawn spots.

fillAmount.label: Длинное заполнение
fillAmount.description: Fill value assigned to activated silos.

enableRealityAutoCollect.label: Автосбор Reality
enableRealityAutoCollect.description: Автоматически собирает готовую Reality / soul power в пустотном мире.

enableScanRealitySurges.label: Волны Reality от сканирования
enableScanRealitySurges.description: Создает случайные волны на плоскости Reality при падении сверхкритического ядра.

enableSuperSilo.label: Супер-силос
enableSuperSilo.description: Поддерживает активированные силосы заполненными заданным длинным значением.

enableScanRealitySlider.label: Ползунок сверхкритического ядра
enableScanRealitySlider.description: Показывает диаметр области и ползунок вливания Reality на карточке покупки сверхкритического ядра.

enableScanRealitySurgesSliderStrength.label: Сила зависит от вливания Reality
enableScanRealitySurgesSliderStrength.description: When enabled, surge count and spawn radius scale with the supercritical kernel Reality infusion; when disabled, the configured count and radius are used.

enableHollowVentReality.label: Источник Reality из полых вентилей
enableHollowVentReality.description: Полые вентили выращивают символы Reality, которые автоматически собираются через алтарь пустоты.

ventRealityInterval.label: Время производства вентиля
ventRealityInterval.description: Сколько секунд полый вентиль выращивает символ Reality.

ventRealityAmount.label: Reality малого вентиля
ventRealityAmount.description: Количество Reality от символа малого полого вентиля.

ventRealityLargeMultiplier.label: Множитель большого вентиля
ventRealityLargeMultiplier.description: Множитель выхода Reality для большого полого вентиля.

enableFlatBuildCosts.label: Отключить рост цены строительства
enableFlatBuildCosts.description: Каждое здание сохраняет базовую цену строительства и не дорожает от количества уже построенных.

hollowTimeFlowMode.label: Ход времени Hollow Stone
hollowTimeFlowMode.description: Постоянно выбирает режим искажения времени Hollow Stone: замедление, обычный режим, ускорение или случайный оригинальный множитель.

de.name: Reality-Paket
de.description: Kombiniert Reality-Autosammlung, Scan-Realitätswellen und Super-Silo in einem TweaksX-Mod.

surgeCount.label: Wellenanzahl
surgeCount.description: Anzahl zufaelliger Wellen beim Einschlag eines superkritischen Kerns.

surgeRadius.label: Spawnradius
surgeRadius.description: Kreisradius in Zellen zur Suche nach freien Spawnfeldern.

fillAmount.label: Lange Füllmenge
fillAmount.description: Fill value assigned to activated silos.

enableRealityAutoCollect.label: Reality automatisch sammeln
enableRealityAutoCollect.description: Sammelt bereite Reality / Soul Power in der Leerenwelt automatisch ein.

enableScanRealitySurges.label: Scan-Realitätswellen
enableScanRealitySurges.description: Erzeugt zufällige Realitätswellen, wenn ein superkritischer Kern landet.

enableSuperSilo.label: Super-Silo
enableSuperSilo.description: Hält aktivierte Silos mit der eingestellten langen Füllmenge gefüllt.

enableScanRealitySlider.label: Regler für superkritischen Kern
enableScanRealitySlider.description: Zeigt den Reichweitendurchmesser und den Reality-Infusionsregler auf der Kaufkarte des superkritischen Kerns.

enableScanRealitySurgesSliderStrength.label: Staerke folgt Reality-Infusion
enableScanRealitySurgesSliderStrength.description: When enabled, surge count and spawn radius scale with the supercritical kernel Reality infusion; when disabled, the configured count and radius are used.

enableHollowVentReality.label: Reality-Quelle aus Hohl-Vents
enableHollowVentReality.description: Hohl-Vents lassen Reality-Symbole wachsen, die automatisch über den Leerenaltar geerntet werden.

ventRealityInterval.label: Vent-Produktionszeit
ventRealityInterval.description: Sekunden, die ein Hohl-Vent braucht, um ein Reality-Symbol wachsen zu lassen.

ventRealityAmount.label: Reality kleiner Vents
ventRealityAmount.description: Reality-Ertrag jedes Symbols eines kleinen Hohl-Vents.

ventRealityLargeMultiplier.label: Multiplikator großer Vents
ventRealityLargeMultiplier.description: Multiplikator für den Reality-Ertrag des großen Hohl-Vents.

enableFlatBuildCosts.label: Baukosten-Skalierung aus
enableFlatBuildCosts.description: Jedes Gebäude behält seine Grundbaukosten, statt mit der vorhandenen Anzahl teurer zu werden.

hollowTimeFlowMode.label: Zeitfluss des Hohlsteins
hollowTimeFlowMode.description: Wählt dauerhaft den Zeitverzerrungsmodus des Hohlsteins: Verlangsamung, normal, Beschleunigung oder zufälliger Vanilla-Multiplikator.

ptbr.name: Pacote Reality
ptbr.description: Combina coleta automática de Reality, surtos de varredura e Super Silo em um mod TweaksX.

surgeCount.label: Quantidade de surtos
surgeCount.description: Numero de surtos aleatorios criados quando um nucleo supercritico cai.

surgeRadius.label: Raio de surgimento
surgeRadius.description: Raio circular, em celulas, usado para procurar espacos vazios.

fillAmount.label: Valor de enchimento longo
fillAmount.description: Fill value assigned to activated silos.

enableRealityAutoCollect.label: Coleta automática de Reality
enableRealityAutoCollect.description: Coleta automaticamente Reality / soul power pronta no mundo vazio.

enableScanRealitySurges.label: Surtos de Reality por varredura
enableScanRealitySurges.description: Cria surtos aleatórios no plano Reality quando um núcleo supercrítico cai.

enableSuperSilo.label: Super Silo
enableSuperSilo.description: Mantém silos ativados preenchidos com o valor longo configurado.

enableScanRealitySlider.label: Controle do núcleo supercrítico
enableScanRealitySlider.description: Mostra o diâmetro do alcance e o controle de infusão de Reality no cartão de compra do núcleo supercrítico.

enableScanRealitySurgesSliderStrength.label: Forca pela infusao Reality
enableScanRealitySurgesSliderStrength.description: When enabled, surge count and spawn radius scale with the supercritical kernel Reality infusion; when disabled, the configured count and radius are used.

enableHollowVentReality.label: Fonte de Reality dos vents ocos
enableHollowVentReality.description: Vents ocos geram símbolos de Reality que são coletados automaticamente pelo altar do vazio.

ventRealityInterval.label: Tempo de produção do vent
ventRealityInterval.description: Segundos para cada vent oco gerar um símbolo de Reality.

ventRealityAmount.label: Reality do vent pequeno
ventRealityAmount.description: Reality obtida de cada símbolo de vent oco pequeno.

ventRealityLargeMultiplier.label: Multiplicador do vent grande
ventRealityLargeMultiplier.description: Multiplicador aplicado à produção de Reality do vent oco grande.

enableFlatBuildCosts.label: Desativar escala de custo de construção
enableFlatBuildCosts.description: Cada construção mantém o custo base, sem aumentar conforme a quantidade já construída.

hollowTimeFlowMode.label: Fluxo de tempo da Pedra Oca
hollowTimeFlowMode.description: Escolhe continuamente o modo de distorção temporal da Pedra Oca: desaceleração, normal, aceleração ou multiplicador aleatório original.

it.name: Pacchetto Reality
it.description: Unisce raccolta automatica Reality, impulsi da scansione e Super Silo in un mod TweaksX.

surgeCount.label: Numero impulsi
surgeCount.description: Numero di impulsi casuali creati quando atterra un nucleo supercritico.

surgeRadius.label: Raggio generazione
surgeRadius.description: Raggio circolare, in celle, usato per cercare spazi liberi.

fillAmount.label: Riempimento lungo
fillAmount.description: Fill value assigned to activated silos.

enableRealityAutoCollect.label: Raccolta automatica Reality
enableRealityAutoCollect.description: Raccoglie automaticamente Reality / soul power pronta nel mondo del vuoto.

enableScanRealitySurges.label: Impulsi Reality da scansione
enableScanRealitySurges.description: Genera impulsi casuali sul piano Reality quando atterra un nucleo supercritico.

enableSuperSilo.label: Super Silo
enableSuperSilo.description: Mantiene i silo attivati pieni con il valore lungo configurato.

enableScanRealitySlider.label: Cursore nucleo supercritico
enableScanRealitySlider.description: Mostra il diametro del raggio e il cursore di infusione Reality sulla scheda di acquisto del nucleo supercritico.

enableScanRealitySurgesSliderStrength.label: Forza da infusione Reality
enableScanRealitySurgesSliderStrength.description: When enabled, surge count and spawn radius scale with the supercritical kernel Reality infusion; when disabled, the configured count and radius are used.

enableHollowVentReality.label: Fonte Reality dei venti cavi
enableHollowVentReality.description: I venti cavi fanno crescere simboli Reality raccolti automaticamente tramite l’altare del vuoto.

ventRealityInterval.label: Tempo produzione vent
ventRealityInterval.description: Secondi necessari a ogni vento cavo per far crescere un simbolo Reality.

ventRealityAmount.label: Reality vento piccolo
ventRealityAmount.description: Reality ottenuta da ogni simbolo di un piccolo vento cavo.

ventRealityLargeMultiplier.label: Moltiplicatore vento grande
ventRealityLargeMultiplier.description: Moltiplicatore applicato alla produzione Reality del grande vento cavo.

enableFlatBuildCosts.label: Disattiva scala costi costruzione
enableFlatBuildCosts.description: Ogni edificio mantiene il costo base invece di aumentare in base a quelli già costruiti.

hollowTimeFlowMode.label: Flusso temporale della Pietra Cava
hollowTimeFlowMode.description: Sceglie continuamente la modalità di distorsione temporale della Pietra Cava: rallentamento, normale, accelerazione o moltiplicatore casuale originale.

es.name: Paquete Reality
es.description: Combina recolección automática de Reality, oleadas por escaneo y Súper silo en un mod TweaksX.

surgeCount.label: Cantidad de oleadas
surgeCount.description: Numero de oleadas aleatorias creadas cuando cae un nucleo supercritico.

surgeRadius.label: Radio de aparición
surgeRadius.description: Radio circular, en celdas, usado para buscar espacios vacios.

fillAmount.label: Valor de llenado largo
fillAmount.description: Fill value assigned to activated silos.

enableRealityAutoCollect.label: Recolección automática de Reality
enableRealityAutoCollect.description: Recolecta automáticamente Reality / soul power lista en el mundo del vacío.

enableScanRealitySurges.label: Oleadas Reality por escaneo
enableScanRealitySurges.description: Genera oleadas aleatorias en el plano Reality cuando cae un núcleo supercrítico.

enableSuperSilo.label: Súper silo
enableSuperSilo.description: Mantiene los silos activados llenos con el valor largo configurado.

enableScanRealitySlider.label: Control del núcleo supercrítico
enableScanRealitySlider.description: Muestra el diámetro de alcance y el control de inyección de Reality en la tarjeta de compra del núcleo supercrítico.

enableScanRealitySurgesSliderStrength.label: Fuerza por inyeccion Reality
enableScanRealitySurgesSliderStrength.description: When enabled, surge count and spawn radius scale with the supercritical kernel Reality infusion; when disabled, the configured count and radius are used.

enableHollowVentReality.label: Fuente de Reality de vents huecos
enableHollowVentReality.description: Los vents huecos cultivan símbolos de Reality que se recogen automáticamente mediante el altar del vacío.

ventRealityInterval.label: Tiempo de producción del vent
ventRealityInterval.description: Segundos que tarda cada vent hueco en cultivar un símbolo de Reality.

ventRealityAmount.label: Reality de vent pequeño
ventRealityAmount.description: Reality obtenida de cada símbolo de vent hueco pequeño.

ventRealityLargeMultiplier.label: Multiplicador de vent grande
ventRealityLargeMultiplier.description: Multiplicador aplicado a la producción de Reality del vent hueco grande.

enableFlatBuildCosts.label: Desactivar escala de coste de construcción
enableFlatBuildCosts.description: Cada edificio mantiene su coste base y no aumenta según la cantidad ya construida.

hollowTimeFlowMode.label: Flujo temporal de la Piedra hueca
hollowTimeFlowMode.description: Elige continuamente el modo de distorsión temporal de la Piedra hueca: desaceleración, normal, aceleración o multiplicador aleatorio original.

fr.name: Pack Reality
fr.description: Regroupe la collecte auto de Reality, les surges de scan et le Super silo dans un mod TweaksX.

surgeCount.label: Nombre de surges
surgeCount.description: Nombre de surges aleatoires creees quand un noyau supercritique atterrit.

surgeRadius.label: Rayon apparition
surgeRadius.description: Rayon circulaire, en cellules, utilise pour trouver des emplacements libres.

fillAmount.label: Remplissage long
fillAmount.description: Fill value assigned to activated silos.

enableRealityAutoCollect.label: Collecte auto de Reality
enableRealityAutoCollect.description: Collecte automatiquement Reality / soul power prête dans le monde du vide.

enableScanRealitySurges.label: Surges Reality de scan
enableScanRealitySurges.description: Crée des surges aléatoires dans le plan Reality quand un noyau supercritique atterrit.

enableSuperSilo.label: Super silo
enableSuperSilo.description: Garde les silos activés remplis avec la valeur longue configurée.

enableScanRealitySlider.label: Curseur du noyau supercritique
enableScanRealitySlider.description: Affiche le diamètre de portée et le curseur d’injection de Reality sur la carte d’achat du noyau supercritique.

enableScanRealitySurgesSliderStrength.label: Puissance par injection Reality
enableScanRealitySurgesSliderStrength.description: When enabled, surge count and spawn radius scale with the supercritical kernel Reality infusion; when disabled, the configured count and radius are used.

enableHollowVentReality.label: Source Reality des évents creux
enableHollowVentReality.description: Les évents creux font pousser des symboles Reality automatiquement récoltés par l’autel du vide.

ventRealityInterval.label: Temps de production de l’évent
ventRealityInterval.description: Secondes nécessaires à chaque évent creux pour faire pousser un symbole Reality.

ventRealityAmount.label: Reality du petit évent
ventRealityAmount.description: Reality obtenue pour chaque symbole de petit évent creux.

ventRealityLargeMultiplier.label: Multiplicateur du grand évent
ventRealityLargeMultiplier.description: Multiplicateur appliqué à la production Reality du grand évent creux.

enableFlatBuildCosts.label: Désactiver l’échelle du coût de construction
enableFlatBuildCosts.description: Chaque bâtiment garde son coût de base au lieu d’augmenter avec le nombre déjà construit.

hollowTimeFlowMode.label: Flux temporel de la pierre creuse
hollowTimeFlowMode.description: Choisit en continu le mode de distorsion temporelle de la pierre creuse : ralentissement, normal, accélération ou multiplicateur aléatoire d’origine.

nl.name: Reality-pakket
nl.description: Combineert Reality automatisch verzamelen, scan-golven en Super-silo in een TweaksX-mod.

surgeCount.label: Aantal golven
surgeCount.description: Aantal willekeurige golven dat ontstaat wanneer een superkritische kern landt.

surgeRadius.label: Verschijnradius
surgeRadius.description: Cirkelradius in cellen om vrije plekken te zoeken.

fillAmount.label: Lange vulwaarde
fillAmount.description: Fill value assigned to activated silos.

enableRealityAutoCollect.label: Reality automatisch verzamelen
enableRealityAutoCollect.description: Verzamelt automatisch klaarstaande Reality / soul power in de leegtewereld.

enableScanRealitySurges.label: Reality-golven door scan
enableScanRealitySurges.description: Maakt willekeurige golven in het Reality-vlak wanneer een superkritische kern landt.

enableSuperSilo.label: Super-silo
enableSuperSilo.description: Houdt geactiveerde silo’s gevuld met de ingestelde lange vulwaarde.

enableScanRealitySlider.label: Schuif voor superkritische kern
enableScanRealitySlider.description: Toont de bereikdiameter en Reality-injectieschuif op de aankoopkaart van de superkritische kern.

enableScanRealitySurgesSliderStrength.label: Kracht volgt Reality-injectie
enableScanRealitySurgesSliderStrength.description: When enabled, surge count and spawn radius scale with the supercritical kernel Reality infusion; when disabled, the configured count and radius are used.

enableHollowVentReality.label: Reality-bron uit holle vents
enableHollowVentReality.description: Holle vents laten Reality-symbolen groeien die automatisch via het leegte-altaar worden geoogst.

ventRealityInterval.label: Productietijd vent
ventRealityInterval.description: Seconden die elke holle vent nodig heeft om een Reality-symbool te laten groeien.

ventRealityAmount.label: Reality kleine vent
ventRealityAmount.description: Reality uit elk symbool van een kleine holle vent.

ventRealityLargeMultiplier.label: Vermenigvuldiger grote vent
ventRealityLargeMultiplier.description: Vermenigvuldiger voor de Reality-opbrengst van de grote holle vent.

enableFlatBuildCosts.label: Bouwkostenschaal uit
enableFlatBuildCosts.description: Elk gebouw behoudt zijn basisbouwkosten in plaats van duurder te worden door het aantal bestaande gebouwen.

hollowTimeFlowMode.label: Tijdstroom van de holle steen
hollowTimeFlowMode.description: Kiest voortdurend de tijdvervormingsmodus van de holle steen: vertraging, normaal, versnelling of een willekeurige originele vermenigvuldiger.

cz.name: Balíček Reality
cz.description: Spojuje automatický sběr Reality, vlny ze skenu a Super silo do jednoho modu TweaksX.

surgeCount.label: Počet vln
surgeCount.description: Pocet nahodnych vln pri dopadu superkritickeho jadra.

surgeRadius.label: Poloměr vzniku
surgeRadius.description: Kruhovy polomer v bunkach pro hledani volnych mist.

fillAmount.label: Dlouhé naplnění
fillAmount.description: Fill value assigned to activated silos.

enableRealityAutoCollect.label: Automatický sběr Reality
enableRealityAutoCollect.description: Automaticky sbírá připravenou Reality / soul power ve světě prázdnoty.

enableScanRealitySurges.label: Vlny Reality ze skenu
enableScanRealitySurges.description: Vytvoří náhodné vlny v rovině Reality při dopadu superkritického jádra.

enableSuperSilo.label: Super silo
enableSuperSilo.description: Udržuje aktivovaná sila naplněná nastavenou dlouhou hodnotou.

enableScanRealitySlider.label: Posuvník superkritického jádra
enableScanRealitySlider.description: Zobrazí průměr dosahu a posuvník vložení Reality na nákupní kartě superkritického jádra.

enableScanRealitySurgesSliderStrength.label: Sila podle vlozene Reality
enableScanRealitySurgesSliderStrength.description: When enabled, surge count and spawn radius scale with the supercritical kernel Reality infusion; when disabled, the configured count and radius are used.

enableHollowVentReality.label: Zdroj Reality z dutých průduchů
enableHollowVentReality.description: Duté průduchy pěstují symboly Reality, které se automaticky sklidí přes oltář prázdnoty.

ventRealityInterval.label: Doba produkce průduchu
ventRealityInterval.description: Kolik sekund potřebuje dutý průduch k vypěstování symbolu Reality.

ventRealityAmount.label: Reality malého průduchu
ventRealityAmount.description: Reality získaná z každého symbolu malého dutého průduchu.

ventRealityLargeMultiplier.label: Násobitel velkého průduchu
ventRealityLargeMultiplier.description: Násobitel výstupu Reality u velkého dutého průduchu.

enableFlatBuildCosts.label: Vypnout škálování stavební ceny
enableFlatBuildCosts.description: Každá stavba si ponechá základní cenu a nezdražuje podle počtu již postavených kusů.

hollowTimeFlowMode.label: Tok času Dutého kamene
hollowTimeFlowMode.description: Průběžně vybírá režim časového zkreslení Dutého kamene: zpomalení, normální stav, zrychlení nebo náhodný původní násobitel.

pl.name: Pakiet Reality
pl.description: Łączy automatyczne zbieranie Reality, skoki po skanie i Super silos w jeden mod TweaksX.

surgeCount.label: Liczba skoków
surgeCount.description: Liczba losowych skokow po upadku superkrytycznego jadra.

surgeRadius.label: Promień pojawiania
surgeRadius.description: Okragly promien w komorkach do szukania wolnych miejsc.

fillAmount.label: Długie napełnienie
fillAmount.description: Fill value assigned to activated silos.

enableRealityAutoCollect.label: Automatyczne zbieranie Reality
enableRealityAutoCollect.description: Automatycznie zbiera gotowe Reality / soul power w świecie pustki.

enableScanRealitySurges.label: Skoki Reality po skanie
enableScanRealitySurges.description: Tworzy losowe skoki na płaszczyźnie Reality po upadku superkrytycznego jądra.

enableSuperSilo.label: Super silos
enableSuperSilo.description: Utrzymuje aktywowane silosy napełnione skonfigurowaną długą wartością.

enableScanRealitySlider.label: Suwak superkrytycznego jądra
enableScanRealitySlider.description: Pokazuje średnicę zasięgu i suwak wlewu Reality na karcie zakupu superkrytycznego jądra.

enableScanRealitySurgesSliderStrength.label: Sila wedlug wlewu Reality
enableScanRealitySurgesSliderStrength.description: When enabled, surge count and spawn radius scale with the supercritical kernel Reality infusion; when disabled, the configured count and radius are used.

enableHollowVentReality.label: Źródło Reality z pustych ujść
enableHollowVentReality.description: Puste ujścia hodują symbole Reality automatycznie zbierane przez ołtarz pustki.

ventRealityInterval.label: Czas produkcji ujścia
ventRealityInterval.description: Sekundy potrzebne pustemu ujściu na wyhodowanie symbolu Reality.

ventRealityAmount.label: Reality małego ujścia
ventRealityAmount.description: Reality uzyskiwana z każdego symbolu małego pustego ujścia.

ventRealityLargeMultiplier.label: Mnożnik dużego ujścia
ventRealityLargeMultiplier.description: Mnożnik produkcji Reality dużego pustego ujścia.

enableFlatBuildCosts.label: Wyłącz skalowanie kosztu budowy
enableFlatBuildCosts.description: Każdy budynek zachowuje bazowy koszt budowy zamiast drożeć wraz z liczbą już zbudowanych.

hollowTimeFlowMode.label: Przepływ czasu Pustego Kamienia
hollowTimeFlowMode.description: Stale wybiera tryb zniekształcenia czasu Pustego Kamienia: spowolnienie, normalnie, przyspieszenie albo losowy oryginalny mnożnik.

jp.name: Realityパック
jp.description: Reality自動回収、スキャン発生サージ、スーパーサイロを1つのTweaksX modに統合します。

surgeCount.label: サージ数
surgeCount.description: 超臨界カーネルが着地した時に生成するランダムサージの数。

surgeRadius.label: 生成半径
surgeRadius.description: 現実面の空きマスを探す円形半径（マス数）。

fillAmount.label: 長時間補充量
fillAmount.description: Fill value assigned to activated silos.

enableRealityAutoCollect.label: Reality自動回収
enableRealityAutoCollect.description: 虚空世界で準備済みのReality / soul powerを自動回収します。

enableScanRealitySurges.label: スキャンRealityサージ
enableScanRealitySurges.description: 超臨界カーネルが着地した時にReality面へランダムなサージを生成します。

enableSuperSilo.label: スーパーサイロ
enableSuperSilo.description: 有効化されたサイロを設定した長時間補充量で維持します。

enableScanRealitySlider.label: 超臨界コアスライダー
enableScanRealitySlider.description: 超臨界コアの購入カードに範囲直径とReality注入スライダーを表示します。

enableScanRealitySurgesSliderStrength.label: Reality注入で強度決定
enableScanRealitySurgesSliderStrength.description: When enabled, surge count and spawn radius scale with the supercritical kernel Reality infusion; when disabled, the configured count and radius are used.

enableHollowVentReality.label: 空洞ベントのReality源
enableHollowVentReality.description: 空洞ベントがRealityシンボルを育て、虚空祭壇を通して自動収穫します。

ventRealityInterval.label: ベント生産時間
ventRealityInterval.description: 各空洞ベントがRealityシンボルを育てる秒数。

ventRealityAmount.label: 小ベントReality
ventRealityAmount.description: 小さな空洞ベントのシンボル1つから得るReality。

ventRealityLargeMultiplier.label: 大ベント倍率
ventRealityLargeMultiplier.description: 大きな空洞ベントのReality出力に適用する倍率。

enableFlatBuildCosts.label: 建設コスト倍率を無効化
enableFlatBuildCosts.description: 各建物の建設コストを基礎価格のままにし、建設済み数で上昇しないようにします。

hollowTimeFlowMode.label: ホロウストーンの時間の流れ
hollowTimeFlowMode.description: ホロウストーンの時間歪曲モードを継続的に選びます：減速、通常、加速、またはバニラのランダム倍率。

kr.name: Reality 팩
kr.description: Reality 자동 수집, 스캔 현실 쇄도, 슈퍼 사일로를 하나의 TweaksX 모드로 합칩니다.

surgeCount.label: 쇄도 수
surgeCount.description: 초임계 핵이 착지할 때 생성할 무작위 쇄도 수입니다.

surgeRadius.label: 생성 반경
surgeRadius.description: 현실 평면의 빈 칸을 찾는 원형 반경입니다.

fillAmount.label: 긴 충전값
fillAmount.description: Fill value assigned to activated silos.

enableRealityAutoCollect.label: Reality 자동 수집
enableRealityAutoCollect.description: 공허 세계에서 준비된 Reality / soul power를 자동으로 수집합니다.

enableScanRealitySurges.label: 스캔 Reality 쇄도
enableScanRealitySurges.description: 초임계 커널이 착지할 때 Reality 평면에 무작위 쇄도를 생성합니다.

enableSuperSilo.label: 슈퍼 사일로
enableSuperSilo.description: 활성화된 사일로를 설정된 긴 충전값으로 유지합니다.

enableScanRealitySlider.label: 초임계 핵 슬라이더
enableScanRealitySlider.description: 초임계 핵 구매 카드에 범위 지름과 Reality 주입 슬라이더를 표시합니다.

enableScanRealitySurgesSliderStrength.label: Reality 주입으로 강도 결정
enableScanRealitySurgesSliderStrength.description: When enabled, surge count and spawn radius scale with the supercritical kernel Reality infusion; when disabled, the configured count and radius are used.

enableHollowVentReality.label: 빈 통풍구 Reality 원천
enableHollowVentReality.description: 빈 통풍구가 Reality 상징을 키우고 공허 제단을 통해 자동 수확합니다.

ventRealityInterval.label: 통풍구 생산 시간
ventRealityInterval.description: 각 빈 통풍구가 Reality 상징을 키우는 초 단위 시간.

ventRealityAmount.label: 작은 통풍구 Reality
ventRealityAmount.description: 작은 빈 통풍구 상징 하나에서 얻는 Reality.

ventRealityLargeMultiplier.label: 큰 통풍구 배율
ventRealityLargeMultiplier.description: 큰 빈 통풍구의 Reality 생산량에 적용되는 배율.

enableFlatBuildCosts.label: 건설 비용 배율 끄기
enableFlatBuildCosts.description: 모든 건물이 기존 건설 수에 따라 비싸지지 않고 기본 건설 비용을 유지합니다.

hollowTimeFlowMode.label: 공허석 시간 흐름
hollowTimeFlowMode.description: 공허석 시간 왜곡 모드를 계속 선택합니다: 시간 감속, 정상, 시간 가속 또는 원본 무작위 배율.

sch.name: 机制修改
sch.description: 修改游戏的机制，可能会影响游戏平衡

surgeCount.label: 浪涌数量
surgeCount.description: 可修改内核振动现实结构后浪涌生成范围内的浪涌数量。

surgeRadius.label: 浪涌生成半径
surgeRadius.description: 可修改内核振动现实结构后浪涌的生成范围。

fillAmount.label: 筒仓填充值
fillAmount.description: 可修改超级筒仓的填充值

enableRealityAutoCollect.label: 现实自动收集
enableRealityAutoCollect.description: 自动收集在虚空维度中完全发亮的符号。

enableScanRealitySurges.label: 强力超临界内核
enableScanRealitySurges.description: 超临界内核得到加强。在震荡现实结构时，会在现实对应位置震出一些浪涌。

enableSuperSilo.label: 超级筒仓
enableSuperSilo.description: 让已激活的筒仓保持配置的超长填充值。

enableScanRealitySlider.label: 可控超临界内核
enableScanRealitySlider.description: 可以注入现实来提升超临界内核的威力。

enableScanRealitySurgesSliderStrength.label: 根据现实注入多少决定强度
enableScanRealitySurgesSliderStrength.description: 开启后，浪涌数量和生成半径会根据超临界内核注入的现实调整；关闭后使用配置里的数量和生成半径。

enableHollowVentReality.label: 虚空维度裂缝现实渗入
enableHollowVentReality.description: 空心石在虚空维度的穿孔裂缝会持续渗入现实。

ventRealityInterval.label: 现实渗入时间
ventRealityInterval.description: 每个现实渗入所需的秒数。

ventRealityAmount.label: 现实渗入数量
ventRealityAmount.description: 每个空心石渗入的现实的数量。

ventRealityLargeMultiplier.label: 大空心石现实渗入倍率
ventRealityLargeMultiplier.description: 大空心石渗入的现实的数量倍率。

enableFlatBuildCosts.label: 关闭建造耗材倍率
enableFlatBuildCosts.description: 每个建筑始终按基础耗材价格建造，不再随已建数量提高。

hollowTimeFlowMode.label: 空心石时间流向
hollowTimeFlowMode.description: 持续选择空心石时间扭曲模式：时间减速、正常、时间加速或随机原版倍率。

tch.name: Reality 整合包
tch.description: 將自動 Reality 收集、超臨界浪湧和超級 Silo 整合為一個 TweaksX mod。

surgeCount.label: 浪湧數量
surgeCount.description: 每次超臨界核心落地時嘗試生成的隨機浪湧數量。

surgeRadius.label: 生成半徑
surgeRadius.description: 以落點為中心搜尋現實世界空格的圓形半徑（格）。

fillAmount.label: 超長填充值
fillAmount.description: Fill value assigned to activated silos.

enableRealityAutoCollect.label: 自動 Reality 收集
enableRealityAutoCollect.description: 在虛空世界自動收集已經準備好的 Reality / soul power。

enableScanRealitySurges.label: 超臨界浪湧
enableScanRealitySurges.description: 超臨界內核落地時，在 Reality 平面生成隨機浪湧。

enableSuperSilo.label: 超級 Silo
enableSuperSilo.description: 讓已啟動的 Silo 保持設定的超長填充值。

enableScanRealitySlider.label: 超臨界核心滑桿
enableScanRealitySlider.description: 在超臨界核心購買卡片上顯示範圍直徑和 Reality 注入滑桿。

enableScanRealitySurgesSliderStrength.label: 根據現實注入多少決定強度
enableScanRealitySurgesSliderStrength.description: 開啟後，浪湧數量和生成半徑會根據超臨界核心注入的現實調整；關閉後使用配置裡的數量和生成半徑。

enableHollowVentReality.label: 空心噴口 Reality 來源
enableHollowVentReality.description: 讓空心石噴口生長 Reality 符號，並透過虛空祭壇自動收割。

ventRealityInterval.label: 噴口生產時間
ventRealityInterval.description: 每個空心噴口生長一個 Reality 符號所需的秒數。

ventRealityAmount.label: 小噴口 Reality
ventRealityAmount.description: 每個小空心噴口符號提供的 Reality。

ventRealityLargeMultiplier.label: 大噴口倍率
ventRealityLargeMultiplier.description: 套用於大空心噴口 Reality 產出的倍率。

enableFlatBuildCosts.label: 關閉建造耗材倍率
enableFlatBuildCosts.description: 每個建築始終按基礎耗材價格建造，不再隨已建數量提高。

hollowTimeFlowMode.label: 空心石時間流向
hollowTimeFlowMode.description: 持續選擇空心石時間扭曲模式：時間減速、正常、時間加速或隨機原版倍率。

thai.name: แพ็ก Reality
thai.description: รวมการเก็บ Reality อัตโนมัติ คลื่นพลังจากการสแกน และไซโลพิเศษไว้ในม็อด TweaksX เดียว

surgeCount.label: จำนวนคลื่นพลัง
surgeCount.description: Number of random surges to create when a supercritical kernel lands.

surgeRadius.label: รัศมีเกิด
surgeRadius.description: Circular radius, in cells, used to search for empty reality-plane spawn spots.

fillAmount.label: ค่าการเติมยาว
fillAmount.description: Fill value assigned to activated silos.

enableRealityAutoCollect.label: เก็บ Reality อัตโนมัติ
enableRealityAutoCollect.description: เก็บ Reality / soul power ที่พร้อมแล้วในโลกวอยด์โดยอัตโนมัติ

enableScanRealitySurges.label: คลื่นพลัง Reality จากสแกน
enableScanRealitySurges.description: สร้างคลื่นพลังแบบสุ่มบนระนาบ Reality เมื่อแกนเหนือวิกฤตตกถึงพื้น

enableSuperSilo.label: ไซโลพิเศษ
enableSuperSilo.description: คงค่าเติมของไซโลที่เปิดใช้แล้วไว้ตามค่าการเติมยาวที่ตั้งไว้

enableScanRealitySlider.label: แถบเลื่อนแกนเหนือวิกฤต
enableScanRealitySlider.description: แสดงเส้นผ่านศูนย์กลางระยะและแถบเลื่อนเติม Reality บนการ์ดซื้อแกนเหนือวิกฤต

enableScanRealitySurgesSliderStrength.label: พลังตามการเติม Reality
enableScanRealitySurgesSliderStrength.description: When enabled, surge count and spawn radius scale with the supercritical kernel Reality infusion; when disabled, the configured count and radius are used.

enableHollowVentReality.label: แหล่ง Reality จากช่องกลวง
enableHollowVentReality.description: ช่องกลวงจะปลูกสัญลักษณ์ Reality และเก็บเกี่ยวอัตโนมัติผ่านแท่นบูชาความว่างเปล่า

ventRealityInterval.label: เวลาผลิตของช่อง
ventRealityInterval.description: จำนวนวินาทีที่ช่องกลวงใช้ปลูกสัญลักษณ์ Reality หนึ่งอัน

ventRealityAmount.label: Reality จากช่องเล็ก
ventRealityAmount.description: Reality ที่ได้จากสัญลักษณ์ของช่องกลวงขนาดเล็กแต่ละอัน

ventRealityLargeMultiplier.label: ตัวคูณช่องใหญ่
ventRealityLargeMultiplier.description: ตัวคูณผลผลิต Reality ของช่องกลวงขนาดใหญ่

enableFlatBuildCosts.label: ปิดการเพิ่มต้นทุนก่อสร้าง
enableFlatBuildCosts.description: สิ่งปลูกสร้างทุกชนิดใช้ต้นทุนพื้นฐานเสมอ ไม่เพิ่มตามจำนวนที่สร้างไว้แล้ว

hollowTimeFlowMode.label: การไหลของเวลาหินกลวง
hollowTimeFlowMode.description: เลือกโหมดบิดเบือนเวลาของหินกลวงอย่างต่อเนื่อง: ช้าลง, ปกติ, เร่งเวลา หรือสุ่มตัวคูณแบบเดิม

hu.name: Reality csomag
hu.description: Egy TweaksX modba egyesíti a Reality automatikus gyűjtést, a scan hullámokat és a szuper silót.

surgeCount.label: Hullámok száma
surgeCount.description: A becsapodaskor letrehozott veletlen hullamok szama.

surgeRadius.label: Megjelenési sugár
surgeRadius.description: Kor alaku sugar cellakban, ahol ures helyeket keres.

fillAmount.label: Hosszú feltöltési érték
fillAmount.description: Fill value assigned to activated silos.

enableRealityAutoCollect.label: Reality automatikus gyűjtése
enableRealityAutoCollect.description: Automatikusan összegyűjti a kész Reality / soul power értéket az üresség világában.

enableScanRealitySurges.label: Scan Reality hullámok
enableScanRealitySurges.description: Véletlen Reality-sík hullámokat hoz létre, amikor egy szuperkritikus mag földet ér.

enableSuperSilo.label: Szuper siló
enableSuperSilo.description: Az aktivált silókat a beállított hosszú feltöltési értéken tartja.

enableScanRealitySlider.label: Szuperkritikus mag csúszka
enableScanRealitySlider.description: Megjeleníti a hatótáv átmérőjét és a Reality-betöltés csúszkáját a szuperkritikus mag vásárlási kártyáján.

enableScanRealitySurgesSliderStrength.label: Ero a Reality-betoltestol
enableScanRealitySurgesSliderStrength.description: When enabled, surge count and spawn radius scale with the supercritical kernel Reality infusion; when disabled, the configured count and radius are used.

enableHollowVentReality.label: Reality-forrás üreges nyílásokból
enableHollowVentReality.description: Az üreges nyílások Reality szimbólumokat növesztenek, amelyeket az üresség oltára automatikusan begyűjt.

ventRealityInterval.label: Nyílás termelési ideje
ventRealityInterval.description: Másodperc, amíg egy üreges nyílás Reality szimbólumot növeszt.

ventRealityAmount.label: Kis nyílás Reality
ventRealityAmount.description: Reality mennyiség minden kis üreges nyílás szimbólumából.

ventRealityLargeMultiplier.label: Nagy nyílás szorzó
ventRealityLargeMultiplier.description: A nagy üreges nyílás Reality termelésére alkalmazott szorzó.

enableFlatBuildCosts.label: Építési költség skálázása ki
enableFlatBuildCosts.description: Minden épület megtartja az alap építési költségét, és nem drágul a már megépített darabszám alapján.

hollowTimeFlowMode.label: Üreges kő időáramlása
hollowTimeFlowMode.description: Folyamatosan kiválasztja az Üreges kő időtorzítási módját: lassítás, normál, gyorsítás vagy véletlen eredeti szorzó.

lv.name: Reality paka
lv.description: Apvieno automātisku Reality savākšanu, skenēšanas viļņus un Super Silo vienā TweaksX modā.

surgeCount.label: Viļņu skaits
surgeCount.description: Nejauso vilnu skaits, kas rodas kodolam piezemejoties.

surgeRadius.label: Rašanās radiuss
surgeRadius.description: Aplveida radiuss sunas, kura meklet brivas vietas.

fillAmount.label: Ilgās uzpildes vērtība
fillAmount.description: Fill value assigned to activated silos.

enableRealityAutoCollect.label: Automātiska Reality savākšana
enableRealityAutoCollect.description: Automātiski savāc gatavo Reality / soul power tukšuma pasaulē.

enableScanRealitySurges.label: Skenēšanas Reality viļņi
enableScanRealitySurges.description: Izveido nejaušus Reality plaknes viļņus, kad superkritiskais kodols piezemējas.

enableSuperSilo.label: Super Silo
enableSuperSilo.description: Uztur aktivizētās tvertnes piepildītas ar iestatīto ilgo uzpildes vērtību.

enableScanRealitySlider.label: Superkritiskā kodola slīdnis
enableScanRealitySlider.description: Rāda diapazona diametru un Reality ieplūdes slīdni superkritiskā kodola iegādes kartītē.

enableScanRealitySurgesSliderStrength.label: Speks pec Reality iepludes
enableScanRealitySurgesSliderStrength.description: When enabled, surge count and spawn radius scale with the supercritical kernel Reality infusion; when disabled, the configured count and radius are used.

enableHollowVentReality.label: Reality avots no dobajām atverēm
enableHollowVentReality.description: Dobās atveres audzē Reality simbolus, kas automātiski tiek savākti caur tukšuma altāri.

ventRealityInterval.label: Atveres ražošanas laiks
ventRealityInterval.description: Sekundes, kas dobajai atverei vajadzīgas Reality simbola izaudzēšanai.

ventRealityAmount.label: Mazās atveres Reality
ventRealityAmount.description: Reality daudzums no katra mazās dobās atveres simbola.

ventRealityLargeMultiplier.label: Lielās atveres reizinātājs
ventRealityLargeMultiplier.description: Reizinātājs lielās dobās atveres Reality ieguvei.

enableFlatBuildCosts.label: Izslēgt būves izmaksu mērogošanu
enableFlatBuildCosts.description: Katra būve saglabā pamata būvniecības izmaksas, nevis kļūst dārgāka pēc jau uzbūvētā skaita.

hollowTimeFlowMode.label: Dobā akmens laika plūsma
hollowTimeFlowMode.description: Nepārtraukti izvēlas Dobā akmens laika kropļojuma režīmu: palēninājums, normāli, paātrinājums vai nejaušs oriģinālais reizinātājs.

ro.name: Pachet Reality
ro.description: Combină colectarea automată Reality, valurile de scanare și Super siloz într-un singur mod TweaksX.

surgeCount.label: Număr de valuri
surgeCount.description: Numarul de valuri aleatorii create cand aterizeaza un nucleu supercritic.

surgeRadius.label: Raza de apariție
surgeRadius.description: Raza circulara, in celule, folosita pentru a cauta locuri libere.

fillAmount.label: Valoare umplere lungă
fillAmount.description: Fill value assigned to activated silos.

enableRealityAutoCollect.label: Colectare automată Reality
enableRealityAutoCollect.description: Colectează automat Reality / soul power pregătită în lumea vidului.

enableScanRealitySurges.label: Valuri Reality la scanare
enableScanRealitySurges.description: Creează valuri aleatorii în planul Reality când aterizează un nucleu supercritic.

enableSuperSilo.label: Super siloz
enableSuperSilo.description: Menține silozurile activate umplute cu valoarea lungă configurată.

enableScanRealitySlider.label: Glisor nucleu supercritic
enableScanRealitySlider.description: Afișează diametrul razei și glisorul de infuzie Reality pe cardul de cumpărare al nucleului supercritic.

enableScanRealitySurgesSliderStrength.label: Putere dupa infuzia Reality
enableScanRealitySurgesSliderStrength.description: When enabled, surge count and spawn radius scale with the supercritical kernel Reality infusion; when disabled, the configured count and radius are used.

enableHollowVentReality.label: Sursă Reality din venturi goale
enableHollowVentReality.description: Venturile goale cresc simboluri Reality colectate automat prin altarul vidului.

ventRealityInterval.label: Timp producție vent
ventRealityInterval.description: Secunde necesare unui vent gol pentru a crește un simbol Reality.

ventRealityAmount.label: Reality vent mic
ventRealityAmount.description: Reality obținută din fiecare simbol al unui vent gol mic.

ventRealityLargeMultiplier.label: Multiplicator vent mare
ventRealityLargeMultiplier.description: Multiplicator aplicat producției Reality a ventului gol mare.

enableFlatBuildCosts.label: Dezactivează scalarea costului de construire
enableFlatBuildCosts.description: Fiecare clădire păstrează costul de bază, fără să crească după numărul deja construit.

hollowTimeFlowMode.label: Fluxul timpului pentru piatra goală
hollowTimeFlowMode.description: Alege continuu modul de distorsiune temporală al pietrei goale: încetinire, normal, accelerare sau multiplicator original aleatoriu.

no.name: Reality-pakke
no.description: Kombinerer automatisk Reality-innsamling, skanningsbølger og Super-silo i én TweaksX-mod.

surgeCount.label: Antall bølger
surgeCount.description: Antall tilfeldige bolger som lages naar en superkritisk kjerne lander.

surgeRadius.label: Oppståelsesradius
surgeRadius.description: Sirkelradius i celler for aa finne ledige plasser.

fillAmount.label: Lang fyllverdi
fillAmount.description: Fill value assigned to activated silos.

enableRealityAutoCollect.label: Automatisk Reality-innsamling
enableRealityAutoCollect.description: Samler automatisk klar Reality / soul power i tomromsverdenen.

enableScanRealitySurges.label: Reality-bølger fra skanning
enableScanRealitySurges.description: Lager tilfeldige bølger i Reality-planet når en superkritisk kjerne lander.

enableSuperSilo.label: Super-silo
enableSuperSilo.description: Holder aktiverte siloer fylt med den konfigurerte lange fyllverdien.

enableScanRealitySlider.label: Skyver for superkritisk kjerne
enableScanRealitySlider.description: Viser rekkeviddediameteren og Reality-infusjonsskyveren på kjøpskortet for den superkritiske kjernen.

enableScanRealitySurgesSliderStrength.label: Styrke folger Reality-infusjon
enableScanRealitySurgesSliderStrength.description: When enabled, surge count and spawn radius scale with the supercritical kernel Reality infusion; when disabled, the configured count and radius are used.

enableHollowVentReality.label: Reality-kilde fra hule ventiler
enableHollowVentReality.description: Hule ventiler dyrker Reality-symboler som automatisk høstes gjennom tomhetsalteret.

ventRealityInterval.label: Produksjonstid for ventil
ventRealityInterval.description: Sekunder hver hul ventil bruker på å dyrke et Reality-symbol.

ventRealityAmount.label: Reality fra liten ventil
ventRealityAmount.description: Reality fra hvert symbol i en liten hul ventil.

ventRealityLargeMultiplier.label: Multiplikator for stor ventil
ventRealityLargeMultiplier.description: Multiplikator brukt på Reality-produksjonen til den store hule ventilen.

enableFlatBuildCosts.label: Slå av byggkostnadsskalering
enableFlatBuildCosts.description: Hver bygning beholder grunnkostnaden i stedet for å bli dyrere ut fra antallet som allerede er bygget.

hollowTimeFlowMode.label: Tidsflyt for hul stein
hollowTimeFlowMode.description: Velger kontinuerlig tidsforvrengningsmodus for hul stein: bremsing, normal, akselerasjon eller tilfeldig original multiplikator.

modsch.name: 机制修改
modsch.description: 修改游戏的机制，可能会影响游戏平衡。

surgeCount.label: 浪涌数量
surgeCount.description: 可修改内核振动现实结构后浪涌生成范围内的浪涌数量。

surgeRadius.label: 浪涌生成半径
surgeRadius.description: 可修改内核振动现实结构后浪涌的生成范围。

fillAmount.label: 筒仓填充值
fillAmount.description: 可修改超级筒仓的填充值

enableRealityAutoCollect.label: 现实自动收集
enableRealityAutoCollect.description: 自动收集在虚空维度中完全发亮的符号。

enableScanRealitySurges.label: 强力超临界内核
enableScanRealitySurges.description: 超临界内核得到加强。在震荡现实结构时，会在现实对应位置震出一些浪涌。

enableSuperSilo.label: 超级筒仓
enableSuperSilo.description: 让已激活的筒仓保持配置的超长填充值。

enableScanRealitySlider.label: 可控超临界内核
enableScanRealitySlider.description: 可以注入现实来提升超临界内核的威力。

enableScanRealitySurgesSliderStrength.label: 根据现实注入多少决定强度
enableScanRealitySurgesSliderStrength.description: 开启后，浪涌数量和生成半径会根据超临界内核注入的现实调整；关闭后使用配置里的数量和生成半径。

enableHollowVentReality.label: 虚空维度裂缝现实渗入
enableHollowVentReality.description: 空心石在虚空维度的穿孔裂缝会持续渗入现实。

ventRealityInterval.label: 现实渗入时间
ventRealityInterval.description: 每个现实渗入所需的秒数。

ventRealityAmount.label: 现实渗入数量
ventRealityAmount.description: 每个空心石渗入的现实的数量。

ventRealityLargeMultiplier.label: 大空心石现实渗入倍率
ventRealityLargeMultiplier.description: 大空心石渗入的现实的数量倍率。

enableFlatBuildCosts.label: 关闭建造耗材倍率
enableFlatBuildCosts.description: 每个建筑始终按基础耗材价格建造，不再随已建数量提高。

hollowTimeFlowMode.label: 空心石时间流向
hollowTimeFlowMode.description: 持续选择空心石时间扭曲模式：时间减速、正常、时间加速或随机原版倍率。
